title: Health Education and Communication Tools | Immigrant and Refugee Health | CDC
text:
. Use these materials to engage and encourage conversations about pregnancy-related concerns. The Urgent Maternal Warning Signs poster is available in Arabic, Dari, Pashto, Hmong, Khmer, Somali and additional languages .
Measles 
Measles resources are available in English and Spanish . A measles poster is also available in English , Dari , and Pashto .
Natural Disasters and Severe Weather 
Resources include how to stay safe after a hurricane . Materials are available in several languages, including languages spoken by refugee communities in the United States.
Polio 
A multi-language poster in English, Dari and Pashto 
Tuberculosis (TB) 
A series of fact sheets and other resources on TB for patients, healthcare providers, and TB programs. Materials are available to share, download, or print.
Varicella (chickenpox) 
A poster is available in English , Dari , and Pashto .
Additional Resources 
CDC Resources in Languages Other than English 
Health Education Resources for binational communities and populations in the U.S.-Mexico border region 
National Institutes of Health 
MedlinePlus: Health Information in Multiple Languages 
MedlinePlus: Health information in Multiple Languages- All Health Topics
